source.sqlReaderQuery:
With 
Customers as (Select CustomerId, Division, Phone, Email from EDW.DIM_Customer  where Division='MAC'),

Leads as (Select Division, LeadId, CustomerId, DateEntered, Entrydate, AP_ID from EDW.FACT_Lead where Division='MAC'),

Appointments as (Select Division, AppointmentId, CustomerId, LeadId, SetDate from EDW.FACT_Appointment where Division='MAC'),

AP_Leads_with_Customerid as 
(
Select  
	L.* , 
	L.Created_At AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time' as CreatedAt_CST,
	Case when L.Created_At AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time'  >'2025-12-09 16:03:00' then 'BTD&Set' else 'BTD' end  as Model ,
	 Coalesce(C.CustomerId,C1.CustomerId,C2.CustomerId) as LP_customerId
	from ODS.AP_Lead_Scores L 
	Left join Customers C on  C.Division='MAC' and Coalesce(L.Phone,'NA')=Coalesce(C.Phone,'NA') and Coalesce(L.Email,'NA')=Coalesce(C.Email,'NA')
	left join Customers C1  on  C1.Division='MAC' and Coalesce(L.Phone,'NA')=Coalesce(C1.Phone,'NA') 
	left join Customers C2 on   C2.Division='MAC' and Coalesce(L.Email,'NA')=Coalesce(C2.Email,'NA')
),

AP_leads_withLeadId as
(
Select T1.*, 
	
	Case when  Model='BTD' then  T1.LP_CustomerId else T4.CustomerId end  as F_CustomerId, 
	Case when  Model='BTD' then  T2.LeadId else T4.LeadId end  as LP_leadId, 

	Case when  Model='BTD' then 
		Case when cast(T2.EntryDate as date) >= cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST as date) and  Dateadd(hour,1,T2.DateEntered)<='2025-12-09 16:03:00' then T2.EntryDate 
			when Cast(T2.Entrydate as date) < Cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST as date) and Cast(T3.Setdate as date)>= Cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST  as date) and Dateadd(hour,1,T3.Setdate)<='2025-12-09 16:03:00' then Coalesce(T3.SetDate,'1970-01-01') 
			else '1970-01-01'  end
		 else T4.Entrydate end as Entrydate 

	,T3.LeadId as App_LeadId,  Coalesce(T3.SetDate,'1970-01-01') as SetDate ,-- only for BTDs

	 Case when  Model='BTD' then 
		Case when Cast(T2.EntryDate as date)>= Cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST  as date) and  Dateadd(hour,1,T2.DateEntered)<='2025-12-09 16:03:00' then 1
		     when Cast(T2.Entrydate as date)< Cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST  as date) and Cast(T3.Setdate as date)>= Cast(T1.CreatedAt_CST as date) and Dateadd(hour,1,T3.Setdate)<='2025-12-09 16:03:00'  then 1 
			else 0 end 
		 else 1 end as Key1

	from AP_Leads_with_Customerid T1 
	Left join Leads T2 on T1.LP_customerId=T2.CustomerId 
	Left join Appointments T3 on T2.LeadId= T3.LeadId
	Left join Leads T4 on T1.CreatedAt_CST >'2025-12-09 16:03:00' and T1.Lead_id=T4.AP_ID
	

),

T_Final As 
(
select Lead_id, Score, Decile, Variant, Reason_code, BTD_Raw_Score, Created_At, Updated_At, Phone, Email, Customer_Id,Test_group, Set_Raw_Score,
 Model,

 Case when ( Variant='B' and Decile in (1,2)) or Key1=0 then Null else  F_CustomerId end as F_CustomerId, 
 Case when ( Variant='B' and Decile in (1,2)) or Key1=0 then Null else  LP_leadId end as LP_LeadID, Entrydate
 ,App_LeadId, SetDate 
 
 From ( Select *, Row_number() over(partition by Lead_Id order by EntryDate desc) as Rn  From AP_leads_withLeadId  ) a
 Where Rn=1
  
)

Select 
'MAC' as Division, Lead_Id as AP_LeadID, Score, Decile, Variant, Reason_Code, BTD_Raw_Score, Created_At, Updated_at, Phone, Email, Customer_id as MarketingCustomerId, 
Test_group, Set_Raw_Score,
F_CustomerId as CustomerId, LP_LeadID as LeadId, Model
--,Entrydate
from T_Final

scripts.text:
-- ============================================================
-- Step 1: Customers
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Customers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Customers;

CREATE TABLE #Customers
(
    CustomerId      NVARCHAR(100),
    Division        NVARCHAR(50),
    Phone           NVARCHAR(50),
    Email           NVARCHAR(100)
);

INSERT INTO #Customers
SELECT CustomerId, Division, Phone, Email
FROM EDW.DIM_Customer
WHERE Division = 'MAC';


-- ============================================================
-- Step 2: Leads
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Leads') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Leads;

CREATE TABLE #Leads
(
    Division        NVARCHAR(50),
    LeadId          NVARCHAR(100),
    CustomerId      NVARCHAR(100),
    DateEntered     DATETIME,
    EntryDate       DATETIME,
    AP_ID           NVARCHAR(100)
);

INSERT INTO #Leads
SELECT Division, LeadId, CustomerId, DateEntered, EntryDate, AP_ID
FROM EDW.FACT_Lead
WHERE Division = 'MAC';


-- ============================================================
-- Step 3: Appointments
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Appointments') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Appointments;

CREATE TABLE #Appointments
(
    Division        NVARCHAR(50),
    AppointmentId   NVARCHAR(100),
    CustomerId      NVARCHAR(100),
    LeadId          NVARCHAR(100),
    SetDate         DATETIME
);

INSERT INTO #Appointments
SELECT Division, AppointmentId, CustomerId, LeadId, SetDate
FROM EDW.FACT_Appointment
WHERE Division = 'MAC';


-- ============================================================
-- Step 4: AP_Leads_with_Customerid
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AP_Leads_with_Customerid') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AP_Leads_with_Customerid;

CREATE TABLE #AP_Leads_with_Customerid
(
    Lead_id         NVARCHAR(100),
    Score           DECIMAL(18,6),
    Decile          INT,
    Variant         NVARCHAR(50),
    Reason_code     NVARCHAR(255),
    BTD_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    Created_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Updated_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Phone           NVARCHAR(50),
    Email           NVARCHAR(100),
    Customer_Id     NVARCHAR(100),
    Test_group      NVARCHAR(50),
    Set_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    CreatedAt_CST   DATETIME,
    Model           NVARCHAR(50),
    LP_CustomerId   NVARCHAR(100)
);

INSERT INTO #AP_Leads_with_Customerid
SELECT  
    L.*,
    L.Created_At AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time'   AS CreatedAt_CST,
    CASE 
        WHEN L.Created_At AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time' > '2025-12-09 16:03:00' 
        THEN 'BTD&Set' 
        ELSE 'BTD' 
    END                                                                     AS Model,
    COALESCE(C.CustomerId, C1.CustomerId, C2.CustomerId)                    AS LP_CustomerId
FROM ODS.AP_Lead_Scores L
LEFT JOIN #Customers C  ON COALESCE(L.Phone,'NA') = COALESCE(C.Phone,'NA')  AND COALESCE(L.Email,'NA') = COALESCE(C.Email,'NA')
LEFT JOIN #Customers C1 ON COALESCE(L.Phone,'NA') = COALESCE(C1.Phone,'NA')
LEFT JOIN #Customers C2 ON COALESCE(L.Email,'NA') = COALESCE(C2.Email,'NA');


-- ============================================================
-- Step 5: AP_Leads_withLeadId
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AP_Leads_withLeadId') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AP_Leads_withLeadId;

CREATE TABLE #AP_Leads_withLeadId
(
    Lead_id         NVARCHAR(100),
    Score           DECIMAL(18,6),
    Decile          INT,
    Variant         NVARCHAR(50),
    Reason_code     NVARCHAR(255),
    BTD_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    Created_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Updated_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Phone           NVARCHAR(50),
    Email           NVARCHAR(100),
    Customer_Id     NVARCHAR(100),
    Test_group      NVARCHAR(50),
    Set_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    CreatedAt_CST   DATETIME,
    Model           NVARCHAR(50),
    LP_CustomerId   NVARCHAR(100),
    F_CustomerId    NVARCHAR(100),
    LP_LeadId       NVARCHAR(100),
    EntryDate       DATETIME,
    App_LeadId      NVARCHAR(100),
    SetDate         DATETIME,
    Key1            INT
);

INSERT INTO #AP_Leads_withLeadId
SELECT 
    T1.*,
    CASE WHEN T1.Model = 'BTD' THEN T1.LP_CustomerId  ELSE T4.CustomerId  END  AS F_CustomerId,
    CASE WHEN T1.Model = 'BTD' THEN T2.LeadId          ELSE T4.LeadId      END  AS LP_LeadId,
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.Model = 'BTD' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN CAST(T2.EntryDate AS DATE) >= CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND DATEADD(HOUR,1,T2.DateEntered) <= '2025-12-09 16:03:00'
                THEN T2.EntryDate
                WHEN CAST(T2.EntryDate AS DATE) < CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND CAST(T3.SetDate AS DATE) >= CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND DATEADD(HOUR,1,T3.SetDate) <= '2025-12-09 16:03:00'
                THEN COALESCE(T3.SetDate, '1970-01-01')
                ELSE '1970-01-01'
            END
        ELSE T4.EntryDate
    END                                                                         AS EntryDate,
    T3.LeadId                                                                   AS App_LeadId,
    COALESCE(T3.SetDate,'1970-01-01')                                           AS SetDate,
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.Model = 'BTD' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN CAST(T2.EntryDate AS DATE) >= CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND DATEADD(HOUR,1,T2.DateEntered) <= '2025-12-09 16:03:00'                   THEN 1
                WHEN CAST(T2.EntryDate AS DATE) < CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND CAST(T3.SetDate AS DATE) >= CAST(T1.CreatedAt_CST AS DATE)
                     AND DATEADD(HOUR,1,T3.SetDate) <= '2025-12-09 16:03:00'                       THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ELSE 1
    END                                                                         AS Key1
FROM #AP_Leads_with_Customerid T1
LEFT JOIN #Leads        T2 ON T1.LP_CustomerId = T2.CustomerId
LEFT JOIN #Appointments T3 ON T2.LeadId        = T3.LeadId
LEFT JOIN #Leads        T4 ON T1.CreatedAt_CST > '2025-12-09 16:03:00' AND T1.Lead_id = T4.AP_ID;


-- ============================================================
-- Step 6: T_Final (deduped by Lead_Id)
-- ============================================================
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Final') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #T_Final;

CREATE TABLE #T_Final
(
    Lead_id         NVARCHAR(100),
    Score           DECIMAL(18,6),
    Decile          INT,
    Variant         NVARCHAR(50),
    Reason_code     NVARCHAR(255),
    BTD_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    Created_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Updated_At      DATETIMEOFFSET,
    Phone           NVARCHAR(50),
    Email           NVARCHAR(100),
    Customer_Id     NVARCHAR(100),
    Test_group      NVARCHAR(50),
    Set_Raw_Score   DECIMAL(18,6),
    Model           NVARCHAR(50),
    F_CustomerId    NVARCHAR(100),
    LP_LeadId       NVARCHAR(100),
    EntryDate       DATETIME,
    App_LeadId      NVARCHAR(100),
    SetDate         DATETIME
);

INSERT INTO #T_Final
SELECT 
    Lead_id, Score, Decile, Variant, Reason_code, BTD_Raw_Score,
    Created_At, Updated_At, Phone, Email, Customer_Id, Test_group, Set_Raw_Score,
    Model,
    CASE WHEN (Variant='B' AND Decile IN (1,2)) OR Key1=0 THEN NULL ELSE F_CustomerId END  AS F_CustomerId,
    CASE WHEN (Variant='B' AND Decile IN (1,2)) OR Key1=0 THEN NULL ELSE LP_LeadId   END  AS LP_LeadId,
    EntryDate,
    App_LeadId,
    SetDate
FROM 
(
    SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Lead_Id ORDER BY EntryDate DESC) AS Rn
    FROM #AP_Leads_withLeadId
) A
WHERE Rn = 1;


-- ============================================================
-- Final SELECT
-- ============================================================

TRUNCATE TABLE  EDW.FACT_LEAD_SCORE;

INSERT INTO EDW.FACT_LEAD_SCORE
(
Division	,
AP_LeadID	,
Score	,
Decile	,
Variant	,
Reason_Code	,
BTD_Raw_Score	,
Created_At	,
Updated_At	,
Phone	,
Email	,
MarketingCustomerId	,
Test_Group	,
Set_Raw_Score	,
Customerid	,
LeadId	,
InsertedTS	,
Model	
)


SELECT 
    'MAC'           AS Division,
    Lead_Id         AS AP_LeadID,
    Score,
    Decile,
    Variant,
    Reason_code,
    BTD_Raw_Score,
    Created_At,
    Updated_At,
    Phone,
    Email,
    Customer_Id     AS MarketingCustomerId,
    Test_group,
    Set_Raw_Score,
    F_CustomerId    AS CustomerId,
    LP_LeadId       AS LeadId,
	GETDATE() 		AS InsertedTS, 
    Model
--  ,EntryDate

FROM #T_Final;
